character_constraint.physical_trait: Right eye covered by bangs throughout entire scene
character_constraint.accessory: Small light-green hair clip on bangs, visible in every shot
character_constraint.body_type: Curvy body type - hard constraint per model sheet
character_constraint.reference: Model sheet for Swordmaster must be applied
Model sheet for Lancer must be applied

global_constraints.scene_constraint: Reference image serves as initial frame for continuity
global_constraints.continuity_constraint: All three segments form continuous narrative flow

segment.narration: LANCER turns his gaze toward SWORDMASTER. He responds with elegant composure, revealing unexpected respect for Rogue despite initial skepticism.

setting.props: Tea cup, low table, traditional seating

camera_direction.framing: LANCER facing camera, slight three-quarter angle
camera_direction.focus: Sharp focus on eyes and facial expression
camera_direction.composition: Centered framing, eye-line matches SWORDMASTER from previous shot

lighting.key_light: Soft window light from camera right
lighting.fill_light: Gentle fill to reveal elegant features

pacing.beat: Pause after question, then elegant smile emerges

dialogue.speaker: LANCER
dialogue.line: I thought it was just politically correct nonsense... but I kind of respect him. He did save the Airbender from falling into the Abyss of Turbid Qi.

dialogue.speaker: SWORDMASTER
dialogue.line: He's been giving himself a whole list of titles—"the OG of the Knight Gang," "the true believer of Inter-Dimensionalism," "the representative of the House of Knight." I could throw out these posh phrases all day.
dialogue.action: Lets out amused breath, bangs still cover right eye

continuity.exit_state: Leads into SWORDMASTER close-up with tea
continuity.visual_markers: Hair clip must remain visible when cutting back to SWORDMASTER
